summary: Iteration 42 — Placement Stability Intelligence. Backend: 16/16 tests in test_iteration42.py PASS. Regression on iter40, iter40b, iter41, iter41b/c/d/e, iter41_extra = 85/85 PASS. Frontend: PlacementStabilityCard renders on children's resident profile, click-to-modal works with modal-score-split / modal-risk-list / modal-suggested-actions. EmergingPlacementConcernsPanel renders on Compliance > Safeguarding Intelligence tab (children's mode) with hero, 6 status tiles, concerns-list (Mads/Aisha), stabilising-list (Jordy '16 days since last incident'), privacy-note. Resident drilldown modal correctly contains PlacementStabilityCard. RBAC: staff redirected away from /compliance (senior+ only), so Safeguarding Intelligence is not reachable by staff.
critical_code_review_comments: All deterministic-engine fields (status, status_label, trend_direction, score, risk/protective_score+factors, signals.base/curr, suggested_actions, explainable_note) validated and stable across repeated calls.

Supportive-tone guardrail enforced: forbidden phrases ('at risk of breakdown', 'failing', 'bad child', 'doomed', 'lost cause', 'hopeless') absent from status_label + suggested_actions; org panel status labels constrained to the 6 approved supportive strings.
Org panel /emerging-concerns lite rows correctly exclude risk_factors / protective_factors / signals / suggested_actions — those are per-child detail only (no PII over-exposure on org view).
Score math verified: score == max(0, sum(risk weights) - sum(protective weights)); risk_score and protective_score reported separately.
RBAC verified end-to-end: per-child endpoint open to all 4 roles (200); /emerging-concerns staff/senior 403, manager/admin 200; unknown resident id 404.
Frontend RBAC: staff has no /compliance route at all (redirects to /), even stronger than the 'hidden tab or graceful error' requirement.

Minor observation (not a bug): when a resident has no protective signals, the top-protective-factor block and modal-protective-list are intentionally not rendered — verified on Mads (No protective signals yet). UI shows 'No protective signals yet.' copy which matches supportive-tone spec.
seed_data_creation: none — used seeded residents (Mads, Leo, Aisha, Jordy)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter42 placement stability is GREEN. Login flow is /welcome -> click 'Enter workspace' under Children's Services -> /login -> email/password. PlacementStabilityCard renders ONLY for children's-mode residents (correct per spec). EmergingPlacementConcernsPanel sits inside Compliance & Oversight > Safeguarding Intelligence tab (children's mode only). Adult-sector boundary was not re-verified in this run but iter42 tests + previous smoke confirmed placeholder fallback. Run pytest with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://safeguard-dash-1.preview.emergentagent.com` set in env or backend tests will fail with MissingSchema.
